sourcesContent:
import React from 'react'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; import { FaFacebook, FaTwitter, FaInstagram, FaLinkedin, FaYoutube, FaGithub, FaHeart, FaEnvelope, FaPhone, FaMapMarkerAlt, FaArrowRight, FaBook, FaFileAlt, FaHistory, FaUpload, FaGraduationCap, FaStar, FaUsers, FaDownload } from 'react-icons/fa'; const Footer = () => { const styles = { footer: { background: 'linear-gradient(145deg, #2D1B4E 0%, #4A2A7A 50%, #6D3B9C 100%)', color: 'white', padding: '4rem 2rem 1rem', marginTop: '4rem', position: 'relative', overflow: 'hidden', borderTop: '4px solid #FFD700', boxShadow: '0 -10px 30px rgba(109, 59, 156, 0.3)' }, // Animated background effect with purple glow backgroundEffect: { position: 'absolute', top: 0, left: 0, right: 0, bottom: 0, background: 'radial-gradient(circle at 30% 40%, rgba(255, 215, 0, 0.15) 0%, transparent 60%), radial-gradient(circle at 70% 80%, rgba(109, 59, 156, 0.3) 0%, transparent 50%)', pointerEvents: 'none', animation: 'pulse 4s ease-in-out infinite' }, container: { maxWidth: '1400px', margin: '0 auto', display: 'grid', gridTemplateColumns: 'repeat(auto-fit, minmax(280px, 1fr))', gap: '3rem', position: 'relative', zIndex: 1 }, section: { marginBottom: '1.5rem', animation: 'fadeInUp 0.6s ease-out' }, title: { color: '#FFD700', marginBottom: '1.5rem', fontSize: '1.4rem', fontWeight: '800', position: 'relative', paddingBottom: '0.5rem', borderBottom: '3px solid rgba(255, 215, 0, 0.3)', display: 'inline-block', textTransform: 'uppercase', letterSpacing: '1px', textShadow: '0 2px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.3)' }, link: { color: '#E0E7FF', textDecoration: 'none', display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: '0.8rem', marginBottom: '0.8rem', transition: 'all 0.3s ease', padding: '0.4rem 0', fontSize: '1rem', fontWeight: '500', '&:hover': { color: '#FFD700', transform: 'translateX(10px)', textShadow: '0 0 8px rgba(255, 215, 0, 0.5)' } }, icon: { fontSize: '1.1rem', color: '#FFD700', filter: 'drop-shadow(0 2px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.3))' }, contactItem: { display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: '1rem', marginBottom: '1rem', color: '#E0E7FF', transition: 'all 0.3s ease', padding: '0.8rem', borderRadius: '12px', background: 'rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05)', border: '1px solid rgba(255, 215, 0, 0.2)', backdropFilter: 'blur(5px)', '&:hover': { background: 'rgba(255, 215, 0, 0.15)', borderColor: '#FFD700', transform: 'translateY(-3px)', boxShadow: '0 8px 20px rgba(255, 215, 0, 0.2)' } }, socialLinks: { display: 'flex', gap: '1rem', marginTop: '1.5rem', flexWrap: 'wrap' }, socialIcon: { width: '45px', height: '45px', borderRadius: '50%', background: 'linear-gradient(145deg, #4A2A7A, #2D1B4E)', display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', justifyContent: 'center', color: '#FFD700', fontSize: '1.3rem', transition: 'all 0.3s ease', cursor: 'pointer', border: '2px solid #FFD700', boxShadow: '0 4px 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.3)', '&:hover': { background: '#FFD700', color: '#2D1B4E', transform: 'translateY(-8px) rotate(360deg)', boxShadow: '0 10px 25px rgba(255, 215, 0, 0.5)' } }, newsletter: { marginTop: '1.5rem', display: 'flex', gap: '0.5rem' }, newsletterInput: { flex: 1, padding: '0.9rem 1.2rem', borderRadius: '12px', border: '2px solid rgba(255, 215, 0, 0.3)', background: 'rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1)', color: 'white', outline: 'none', transition: 'all 0.3s', fontSize: '0.95rem', '&::placeholder': { color: 'rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.6)' }, '&:focus': { borderColor: '#FFD700', background: 'rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.15)', boxShadow: '0 0 20px rgba(255, 215, 0, 0.3)' } }, newsletterBtn: { padding: '0.9rem 1.5rem', borderRadius: '12px', border: 'none', background: 'linear-gradient(145deg, #FFD700, #FFA500)', color: '#2D1B4E', fontWeight: '700', cursor: 'pointer', transition: 'all 0.3s', display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: '0.5rem', fontSize: '0.95rem', textTransform: 'uppercase', letterSpacing: '0.5px', boxShadow: '0 4px 15px rgba(255, 215, 0, 0.4)', '&:hover': { background: 'linear-gradient(145deg, #FFA500, #FFD700)', transform: 'translateX(5px) scale(1.05)', boxShadow: '0 8px 25px rgba(255, 215, 0, 0.6)' } }, bottom: { textAlign: 'center', paddingTop: '2rem', marginTop: '3rem', borderTop: '2px solid rgba(255, 215, 0, 0.2)', color: '#E0E7FF', position: 'relative', zIndex: 1 }, heart: { color: '#FF6B6B', animation: 'heartbeat 1.5s ease-in-out infinite', display: 'inline-block', margin: '0 0.3rem', filter: 'drop-shadow(0 0 5px #FF6B6B)' }, stats: { display: 'grid', gridTemplateColumns: 'repeat(2, 1fr)', gap: '1rem', marginTop: '1.5rem' }, statBox: { background: 'linear-gradient(145deg, rgba(74, 42, 122, 0.5), rgba(45, 27, 78, 0.5))', padding: '1.2rem', borderRadius: '12px', textAlign: 'center', transition: 'all 0.3s', border: '1px solid rgba(255, 215, 0, 0.2)', backdropFilter: 'blur(5px)', '&:hover': { background: 'rgba(255, 215, 0, 0.15)', borderColor: '#FFD700', transform: 'scale(1.05) translateY(-5px)', boxShadow: '0 10px 25px rgba(255, 215, 0, 0.3)' } }, statIcon: { color: '#FFD700', fontSize: '1.5rem', marginBottom: '0.3rem' }, statNumber: { fontSize: '1.6rem', fontWeight: '800', color: '#FFD700', lineHeight: '1.2', textShadow: '0 2px 5px rgba(0,0,0,0.3)' }, statLabel: { fontSize: '0.8rem', color: '#E0E7FF', textTransform: 'uppercase', letterSpacing: '0.5px' } }; return (

); }; export default Footer;
